---
title: "vector.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\forge_staged\vector.py"
loc: 7
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.60
style_score: 9.31
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.27
---

## Intent
The `vector.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignVector, apply_evolution_delta. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignVector, apply_evolution_delta. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `SovereignVector`
- `apply_evolution_delta`
